'''thahungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jibstay|jibstay]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jibstay|jibstay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thahungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæhingith|thæhingith]] || [[word:thæhingij|thæhingij]] || [[word:thæhingish|thæhingish]] || [[word:thæhingi|thæhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thahuhunguth|thahuhunguth]] || [[word:thahuhunguj|thahuhunguj]] || [[word:thahuhungush|thahuhungush]] || [[word:thahuhungu|thahuhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahunguth|thahunguth]] || [[word:thahunguj|thahunguj]] || [[word:thahungush|thahungush]] || [[word:thahungu|thahungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahufnguth|thahufnguth]] || [[word:thahufnguj|thahufnguj]] || [[word:thahufngush|thahufngush]] || [[word:thahufnguf|thahufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thahunguthu|thahunguthu]] || [[word:thahunguju|thahunguju]] || [[word:thahungushu|thahungushu]] || [[word:thahunguku|thahunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thahunguth|thahunguth]] || [[word:thahunguj|thahunguj]] || [[word:thahungush|thahungush]] || [[word:thahungu|thahungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thahunguthul|thahunguthul]] || [[word:thahungujul|thahungujul]] || [[word:thahungushul|thahungushul]] || [[word:thahungukul|thahungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thahunguthuthu|thahunguthuthu]] || [[word:thahungujuju|thahungujuju]] || [[word:thahungushushu|thahungushushu]] || [[word:thahunguku|thahunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thahunguthun|thahunguthun]] || [[word:thahungujun|thahungujun]] || [[word:thahungushun|thahungushun]] || [[word:thahungukun|thahungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thahunguthuoro|thahunguthuoro]] || [[word:thahungujuoro|thahungujuoro]] || [[word:thahungushuoro|thahungushuoro]] || [[word:thahungukuoro|thahungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
